name: CLI test sweep — improve test coverage and fix issues

description: Baseline: 407 passing tests (237 CLI + 153 SDK + 17 smoke), 25 test files, 0 failures

Added 3 new test files: changelog (16 tests), blueprint-to-agent (20 tests), blueprint-to-workflow (15 tests). Also includes package upgrades (typescript 6, @types/node 25, commander 14, vitest 4.1, dotenv 17.4).
Added company-blueprints tests: BLUEPRINTS registry, listBlueprints, getBlueprint, blueprintKind, blueprintComplexity

learnings.workflow_blueprints: have empty agents arrays, need separate check

description: Added gateway handler tests: health endpoint, webhook routing, unknown channel, empty body, invalid JSON, connector skip, non-webhook routes

learnings.gateway_testing: Mock connectors with vi.fn() and use Request/Response Web API

description: Rewrote template-cache tests (was 9, now 13 tests). Covers manifest write/read, file generation, query cleanup, sample IDs, sanitization.
Added gateway connector tests: WebhookConnector (8 tests), PaperclipConnector (1), LinearConnector (1). Covers parsing, validation, thread_id, task_id, callback_url.
Added SDK HTTP transport tests: constructor, GET request, JSON body, query params, array params, NetworkError, RequestTimeoutError. 502 total tests.

learnings.sdk_http_client: can mock global fetch with vi.spyOn

description: Expanded smoke tests from 17 to 22 (added context --json, schema agent --field, playbook amazon-seller, blueprints list --json, blueprints get --id)
Expanded smoke tests to 29 (added schema agent --field suggested_messages, schema workforce, blueprints get amazon-seller, skill list, pack list)

learnings.node_types: requires API key, skip from offline smoke tests

description: Added SDK client tests: DEFAULT_BASE_URL, createClient with all option combos, resource availability (agents, workflows, workforces, connections). 526 total tests.
Expanded local-validation tests from 6 to 20: workflow create/update/run, agent create/update/stream, null/undefined/non-object edge cases. 542 total tests.
Final stable run: 542 passing tests (339 CLI + 174 SDK + 29 smoke), 33 test files, 0 failures, build OK

Added SDK marketplace tests: MarketplaceResource (list/get with type, featured, isFree, extra params), AgentTemplatesResource, WorkflowTemplatesResource (sort_order, listByCategory), MasTemplatesResource
Expanded SDK exceptions tests from 12 to 22: inheritance chains, cause propagation, requestId, statusCode edge cases, stack traces

Expanded utils-models tests from 7 to 20: KNOWN_MODELS validation, plausible-but-unknown models, vendor/name format, edge cases (empty slash, vendor only, model only), non-string inputs, suggestion content
Expanded utils-deprecation tests 5→17: dedup edge cases, sunset date, silence env values (1 vs 0 vs true), resetDeprecationDedup, empty command dedup

Expanded utils-mcp-inspect tests 5→19: write verb patterns (upsert/remove/replace/clear/merge/new-), renew/newer exclusion, missing inputSchema, empty properties, missing/non-string name, quirk message content

summary.learning: Pipedream quirk uses pipedreamTools.length (total) not risky.length (write-capable) for tool count

description: Expanded utils-patch tests 10→26: stripNullFields (custom stripList, empty payload, reference, false/0 preservation), mergePatch (new keys, deep merge levels, non-plain objects, array/object replacement, null handling, reference)

Expanded template-duplicate tests 4→34: inferTemplateId (all fields, edge cases, trimming), indexTemplatesById (empty, dedup, missing id), buildWorkflowCreatePayloadFromTemplate (nodes formats, flat workflow, missing name), extractAgentTemplateWorkflowReferences (defaults, non-record tools), buildAgentCreatePayloadFromTemplate (all fields, empty tools, nameSuffix)
Expanded SDK types tests 8→21: HTTP status codes (201, 202, 204, 400, 429, 500, 502), JSON primitives (string, boolean, number, null), JSON arrays, requestMethod preservation, charset content-type
Expanded playbooks tests 6→17: topic coverage (gateway, paperclip, channels, migration), content assertions (mcp quirks, company-from-scratch, amazon-seller), uniqueness, immutability, minimum count

Expanded SDK http tests 9→22: HTTP methods (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), error causes (NetworkError, RequestTimeoutError), AbortController/signal, response headers, null json body behavior, param encoding, non-2xx status handling
Expanded operation-ids tests 9→21: key coverage (update, dynamic_options, categories, input_create), type checks, spec resolution, alias uniqueness, minimum alias count
Expanded gateway tests 9→15: multi-connector routing, empty connectors list, HTTP method rejection (PUT/DELETE), channel availability in 404 response
